chapter_title.en: Chapter 160 – Bringing forward the Tawaaf for the performer of the exclusive Hajj

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/114)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/114)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ مُفْرِدِ الْحَجِّ يُقَدِّمُ طَوَافَهُ أَوْ يُؤَخِّرُهُ فَقَالَ هُوَ وَ اللَّهِ سَوَاءٌ عَجَّلَهُ أَوْ أَخَّرَهُ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Hammad Bin Usman who said,
‘I asked Abu Abdullahasws about the performer of exclusive Hajj bringing forward his Tawaaf, or should he delay it?’ So heasws said: ‘By Allahazwj, it is the same, hastening it or delaying it’.
en.sarwar: 2. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Husayn ibn Sa‘id from Safwan ibn Yahya from Hammad ibn ‘Uthaman who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who is for Mufrid al-Hajj; if he can perform his Tawaf first or later. He (the Imam) said, Tt, by Allah, is the same to perform immediately or later.’”
